info.title: almops
info.description:
devpro.fr
--user                   Username (usually the email address).
--token                  Token (PAT = Personal Access Token).
--org                    Organization name.
-p, --project            Project name.
--id                     Resource ID.
--type                   Resource type.
-n, --name               Resource name.
-b, --branch             Branch name.
-t, --tag                Tag.
--var                    Variables.
-q, --query              Information to send back.
-v, --verbose            Set output to verbose messages.
--help                   Display this help screen.
--version                Display version information.
value pos. 0 Action      Required. Action (possible values: "config", "list",
"show", "queue", "create", "update").
value pos. 1 Resource    Resource (possible values: "projects", "builds",
"build", "release", "artifacts", "variables").

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
